failure_attribution.evidence: signal series coverage gap, market coverage gap, stale or partial signal inputs
failure_attribution.next_action: repair data coverage before interpreting new candidate results

failure_attribution.evidence: v_shaped_recovery source window dates missing; previous binding used partial/static proxy evidence
failure_attribution.next_action: extend executable binding to historical signal and research-weight series

failure_attribution.evidence: latest signal robustness review was BLOCKED by partial/stale/coverage checks
failure_attribution.next_action: separate signal quality repair from allocator redesign

failure_attribution.evidence: single regime-to-weight rule carried signal, risk, cost and execution behavior
failure_attribution.next_action: split signal, allocator, risk-control and execution layers

failure_attribution.evidence: slow_drawdown failed and V-shaped recovery coverage was missing
failure_attribution.next_action: test fast asymmetric risk overlay as independent ablation

failure_attribution.evidence: medium/high cost scenarios remained weak after mini backfill
failure_attribution.next_action: test no-trade band and turnover control before adding alpha complexity

failure_attribution.evidence: candidate underperformed or had insufficient margin versus QQQ/SPY/SMH/SOXX/equal-weight baselines
failure_attribution.next_action: require benchmark-relative rows in every ablation result

failure_attribution.evidence: window sensitivity was FRAGILE with weak recent and stress-heavy splits
failure_attribution.next_action: freeze development versus diagnostic versus holdout usage

failure_attribution.evidence: prior research reused diagnostic/stress windows and showed high overfit risk
failure_attribution.next_action: require parameter-neighborhood stability and purged walk-forward before full backfill

failure_attribution.evidence: no active governance bypass; safety boundaries remained fail-closed
failure_attribution.next_action: preserve hard stops; do not use validation PASS as research PASS

reader_brief.summary: 上一轮候选失败不是单一工程问题，而是 data coverage、binding、signal robustness、allocator mapping、risk control、cost/benchmark 和 window fragility 的组合问题。
reader_brief.blocking_issues: B1 已有 mixed execution-control mini-backfill；B2-B6 真实消融结果尚不存在，不能进入 candidate v3。
reader_brief.warnings: 已反复使用的 stress/casebook 只能作为 development 或 diagnostic set。
reader_brief.next_action: review B1 mixed evidence and keep B2-B6 blocked until independent runner and signal evidence requirements are satisfied
